testcase.name: test_auth_login_sets_http_only_cookie

failure.message: assert False + where False = any(<generator object test_auth_login_sets_http_only_cookie.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xf8e9e82999a0>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_playbook_requirements.py:29: in test_auth_login_sets_http_only_cookie assert any(keyword in cookie_lower for keyword in ["access", "token", "session", "auth"]) E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object test_auth_login_sets_http_only_cookie.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xf8e9e82999a0>)

testcase.name: test_auth_cors_credentials_and_explicit_origin

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'true' + where None = get('access-control-allow-credentials') + where get = {'Date': 'Wed, 01 Apr 2026 07:59:16 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'CF-RAY': '9e560dae5f79e80a-ORD'}.get + where {'Date': 'Wed, 01 Apr 2026 07:59:16 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'CF-RAY': '9e560dae5f79e80a-ORD'} = <Response [204]>.headers

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_playbook_requirements.py:48: in test_auth_cors_credentials_and_explicit_origin assert response.headers.get("access-control-allow-credentials") == "true" E AssertionError: assert None == 'true' E + where None = get('access-control-allow-credentials') E + where get = {'Date': 'Wed, 01 Apr 2026 07:59:16 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'CF-RAY': '9e560dae5f79e80a-ORD'}.get E + where {'Date': 'Wed, 01 Apr 2026 07:59:16 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'CF-RAY': '9e560dae5f79e80a-ORD'} = <Response [204]>.headers

testcase.name: test_auth_lockout_after_five_failed_attempts
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_playbook_requirements.py:61: in test_auth_lockout_after_five_failed_attempts assert statuses[-1] in [423, 429] E assert 401 in [423, 429]
